news.paragraph: Cisco Systems (CSCO) is receiving mixed signals from recent news, with some analysts highlighting its long-term AI investments and a recent price target increase from BofA following Q3 results. However, other reports suggest competitors like Nokia may be better positioned in the AI networking space, and one article notes that CSCO is following Intel in passing its dot-com record, a point that could be interpreted in various ways. The overall sentiment is neutral as the company navigates its AI strategy and market positioning.

headlines.title: Cisco's Biggest AI Bet Wasn't Made In 2025 — It Was Made In 2016
NetApp to Follow Intel, Cisco in Passing Dot-Com Record. Don't Mention Bubbles.
Cisco (CSCO) Gets Higher Price Target From BofA Following Q3 Results
